title: esops-doctor waivers file
description: Operator suppression list. Looked up at ./.esops-doctor.yaml, $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/esops-doctor/waivers.yaml, and ~/.config/esops-doctor/waivers.yaml, or pointed at via --waivers PATH.

rule_id.description: Rule ID to suppress. Deprecated aliases are resolved against the catalog at load time.

justification.description: Why the waiver exists. Required — undocumented suppressions defeat the purpose.

expires_at.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Snapped to end-of-day UTC. Omit for a permanent waiver; expired waivers re-surface the finding with a `[waiver expired …]` prefix.
